proposal_summary: Initialize a Compound III USDT market (cUSDTv3) on the Optimism network, including deployment, seeding reserves via a bridge, setting reward configurations, and updating the official markets ENS record.

disclosed_entities.name: cUSDT
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The second action reduces Compound cUSDT reserves to Timelock

disclosed_entities.name: L1StandardBridge
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's USDT

disclosed_entities.name: Timelock
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: reserves to Timelock, in order to seed the market reserves

disclosed_entities.name: Comet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: deploys a new Comet implementation on Optimism

disclosed_entities.name: Optimism rewards contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's USDT

claimed_actions.raw_action: Set the Comet configuration and deploy a new Comet implementation on Optimism via cross-chain bridge.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Deploys Compound III on Optimism with governance-approved parameters.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The first proposal action sets the Comet configuration and deploys a new Comet implementation on Optimism. This sends the encoded setFactory, setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge

claimed_actions.raw_action: Set reward config on the Optimism rewards contract.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Establishes bridged COMP as the reward token (5 COMP/day for supply/borrow).
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: It also calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract, to establish Optimism’s bridged version of COMP as the reward token

claimed_actions.raw_action: Reduces Compound cUSDT reserves to Timelock.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Moves USDT reserves to Timelock to prepare for seeding the new market.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The second action reduces Compound cUSDT reserves to Timelock, in order to seed the market reserves

claimed_actions.raw_action: Approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's USDT.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allows the bridge to pull USDT from Timelock for seeding reserves.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The third action approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's USDT, in order to seed the reserves

claimed_actions.raw_action: Deposits 10K USDT from mainnet to the Optimism L1StandardBridge.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Bridges 10k USDT to Comet on Optimism to seed reserves.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The fourth action deposits 10K USDT from mainnet to the Optimism L1StandardBridge contract to bridge to Comet.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Updates the ENS TXT record v3-official-markets.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the official markets JSON to include the new Optimism cUSDTv3 market.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The fifth action updates the ENS TXT record v3-official-markets on v3-additional-grants.compound-community-licenses.eth

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires multiple steps, including cross-chain bridging of calls to deploy an implementation, reducing reserves, performing cross-chain token transfers to seed reserves, setting reward configs, and updating ENS records.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: sends the encoded setFactory, setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge... reduces Compound cUSDT reserves... approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge... deposits 10K USDT from mainnet... updates the ENS TXT record

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: sends the encoded setFactory, setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge
sends the encoded setFactory, setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge
sends the encoded setFactory, setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge
It also calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract

limitations: Addresses for the Optimism rewards contract, deployed Comet proxy, and governance receivers are not explicitly listed in the text.
It assumes familiarity with the Comet suite and external Gauntlet recommendations referenced as links, whose precise parameters aren't explicitly written in the proposal body.
